title: henxels contract
description: A whiteboard list of rules (henxels). Each henxel is a sentence plus statements that must all pass.

imports.description: Modules that register custom statements (also auto-loaded from henxels_checks.py / .henxels/).

henxels.description: The rule list. Each item is one henxel.

warn_about_large_files.description: Warn (never block) when a file exceeds a size threshold. over: <number> <unit> where unit is b/kb/mb/gb/tokens/lines (optional space; tokens are an estimate).

henxel.description: One rule: a sentence (henxel:) + an optional in:/level: + statements.
the rule, in plain words (also the failure message)

in.description: where this henxel applies: ./docs = that folder, ./docs/* = recursively, ./ = repo root, ./* = whole repo (default)

except.description: paths/globs carved out of in: (e.g. exclude ./raw/* and index.md from a ./* page rule)

why.description: background/reasoning: why the rule exists, how the target is used, what purpose it serves. Not a test — it rides into AGENTS.md so agents read the intent. Aliases: context, comment.

filename_casing.description: file names use this naming convention (list = any of)

allowed_filetypes.description: every file is one of these extensions/globs (list = OR)

required_frontmatter.description: markdown declares these keys with a non-empty value (list = all)

no_frontmatter.description: markdown files here carry no YAML frontmatter block (e.g. OKF's reserved index.md/log.md)

frontmatter_dates.description: these frontmatter fields are valid ISO dates (YYYY-MM-DD); the dict form {field: datetime} allows full ISO 8601 datetimes

frontmatter_values.description: frontmatter fields hold values from an allowed set (scalar ∈ set; list ⊆ set)

frontmatter_sha256_matches.description: this frontmatter field equals the SHA-256 of the body below the frontmatter

max_lines.description: each file in scope stays under this many lines

no_secrets.description: files contain no credentials (private keys, API tokens, passwords)

append_only.description: staged edits only add lines to the end; existing lines are never changed

immutable.description: files here can be added but never modified once committed

bump_updated_on_change.description: when a page's content changes, its date field must change too (default field: updated)

changed_with.description: commit-time reminder (directional): when files matching `when` are staged, files matching `expect` should change too (pair with level: warn)

must_be_in_sync.description: commit-time reminder (symmetric): groups of files/folders that change together. A flat list is one group; a list of lists is several. Pair with level: warn.

links_are_relative.description: internal markdown links are relative, not absolute paths

links_resolve.description: every relative internal markdown link points at a real file

rooted_links_resolve.description: root-absolute internal links (/x/y) resolve to a real page under this site root dir (e.g. ./docs/content)

min_outbound_links.description: each page links out to at least N other pages

referenced_in.description: every page in scope is linked from this index file (e.g. index.md)
